results.rendered_html:
tālī
1 A species of the mountainpalm, palm-tree.
2 The common toddy (tādī).
3 Fragrant earth.
4 A sort of key.
Comp.
— vanaṃ a grove of palm trees;  R. 4. 34 , 6. 57.
